raw_consumer_statement:
We used our credit card to make a purchase of 2 bottles of water from a storefront while in XXXX on XXXX at approximately XXXX local. The total purchase price should have been XXXX. We noticed when reviewing our billing statement that we had been charged XXXX ( {$450.00} ) for the transaction, and immediately started the dispute process with Citibank on XXXX. Citi provided a conditional credit of {$440.00}. 

Citibank asked us for additional statement/information on XXXX, which we returned on XXXX XXXX. They asked for a copy of the purchase receipt- which we did not have, as we were not provided one. We explained this to Citi, along with attempting to contact the merchant to either fix the problem or obtain a receipt. We have been unable to obtain a phone number for the business. 

Citi bank closed the dispute on XXXX XXXX, with a finding that the customer ( me ) was responsible for the charge, as we could not provide a purchase receipt. To our knowledge, the investigator did not make any attempt to actually contact the merchant or obtain any amplifying information about the purchase. 

I have asked Citi to re-open the investigation, as I am continuing to attempt to gain contact information for the vendor.
